item.summary: Create release bridge from jobs to scripts

body:
# Description

Implement this task.


# [PKT-JOB-006](task-0062): Release Bridge

## Purpose

Create release bridge from jobs to scripts.

## Scope

- Bridge logic
- Script invocation
- Error handling

## Implementation

1. Implement bridge
2. Add script invocation
3. Handle errors

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Bridge works
2. Scripts invoked
3. Errors handled
